correctiveBranchBehaviour.issue: Branch was created from a main commit that became behind current main during setup. A force-update was attempted and immediately stopped after user correction.
correctiveBranchBehaviour.outcome: The force update did not take effect. The tainted branch was abandoned. A clean branch was created from current main.

reviewCorrections.issue: The loader stopped after structured-rule anyOf matching and did not fall back to registry keywords.
reviewCorrections.correction: Preserved registry keyword fallback with explicit selectionBasis registry-keyword-fallback and matchedRegistryKeywords evidence.
reviewCorrections.coverage: Regression test asserts Improve the service page selects govuk-design-system through registry keyword page.

reviewCorrections.issue: The eval runner did not enforce expectedSafeguards, expectedEvidence or forbiddenFailureModes.
reviewCorrections.correction: Eval runner now validates expected safeguards, expected evidence, forbidden failure modes, latest-prompt conflict detection and reasoning trace outputs.
reviewCorrections.coverage: agent:evals now fails if declared behavioural controls are not represented in loader output.

mechanisticBoundary: No direct activation evidence is produced. Mechanistic trace entries are hypotheses unless model-internal tooling is available.
